room.caption: [G2-TownC] Not really a town.
room.creationCode:
locationCheck(10) global.zEncZone=3
if global.gameProgress=650 global.gameProgress=660
gameScene=instance_create(0,0,oEvCh4MainA) //sideChat=instance_create(0,0,oEvCh4SideA)
var tempMplay; tempMplay=findMusic(206) playMusic(tempMplay,0,0)

instance.creationCode:
talker="A Guy" stringToShow="Did you know that when you deploy a bomb midair, that you stall your downward momentum just a tiny bit? We like to call it the bomb stall! It's so awesome! ... And kinda nerdy we have a name for it..." boxSize=3
AI_Action=2 runAcc=-0.75 image_speed=0.15 sprite_index=sNPC_ZMan
